items.en: This is my pen.
My notebook is lying on the desk.
The teacher writes on the board.
There are books in my bag.
The students are sitting at their desks.
I need a pencil.
The classroom is big.
Is this eraser yours?
Our school has a library.
The lesson starts at nine.
Monday is the first day of the week.
Today is Tuesday.
My birthday is in January.
March is a spring month.
This is the first month of the year.
He came second in the class.
We live on the third floor.
Sunday is a day off.
December is the last month of the year.
The fifth lesson is mathematics.

items.kk: Бұл үй үлкен, ал анау кішкентай.
items.en: This house is big, and that one is small.
The tea is hot, the water is cold.
The road is long, the street is short.
The book is light, the stone is heavy.
This answer is correct, that one is wrong.
The window is open, the door is closed.
He bought a new car.

items.kk: Менің ағам биік, ал мен аласамын.
items.en: My brother is tall, and I am short.
This task is easy, that one is difficult.
The day is bright, the night is dark.
